must_have_fields.name: jobs.source_external_identity
must_have_fields.requirement: Imported ATS jobs must preserve source, source_url, and external_job_id for idempotency, provider detail lookup, and application fallback.
must_have_fields.implementation_hint: Keep source/source_url/external_job_id on jobs and source/external_id/source_url on companies. Use company_id + source + external_job_id as the natural imported job identity.

must_have_fields.name: employment_records.customer_id
must_have_fields.requirement: Employment records are reusable customer-owned Career records, not skills and not resume-only text.
must_have_fields.implementation_hint: Scope employment_records by authenticated customer id and attach to resumes through resume_employment_records.

must_have_fields.name: job_application_submissions.sanitized_provider_audit
must_have_fields.requirement: External provider submissions must retain sanitized audit status without storing raw sensitive provider payloads.
must_have_fields.implementation_hint: Store provider name/status/application URL and sanitized failure/status metadata; do not store raw response bodies, tokens, or resume binary data.

must_have_relationships.name: customer_to_career_records
must_have_relationships.requirement: Customer-owned skill profiles, resumes, employment records, carts, and applications must resolve ownership from authenticated JWT context.
must_have_relationships.implementation_hint: Handlers look up customers.user_id and repositories scope by customer_id. Do not trust request-supplied customer_id for customer self-service.

must_have_relationships.name: resume_to_employment_records
must_have_relationships.requirement: A resume can attach multiple reusable employment records, and one employment record can be reused across resumes.
must_have_relationships.implementation_hint: Use resume_employment_records with sort_order, include, tailored_title, and tailored_summary. Verify ownership of both sides before mutation.

must_have_relationships.name: resume_text_import
must_have_relationships.requirement: Resume text upload/import must parse and persist through CareerProfile service APIs, not through direct app, AI, or database writes.
must_have_relationships.implementation_hint: Use ParseResumeText for .txt/.md validation and draft extraction, then ImportResumeDraft or batch CareerProfile APIs to create skill profile, skills, employment records, resume, and attachments under authenticated customer ownership.

must_have_relationships.name: job_to_application_submission
must_have_relationships.requirement: Internal applications and external ATS provider submissions are separate records.
must_have_relationships.implementation_hint: Preserve job_applications as the internal application record and job_application_submissions as sanitized provider submission/audit records.

business_rules.name: service_owned_search
business_rules.requirement: Career job search is owned by career.JobService/SearchJobs and may use Typesense only behind ceerat-user-service.
business_rules.implementation_hint: Browser apps, crawlers, and AI tools call Ceerat APIs/gRPC only. Keep Postgres as source of truth and hide Typesense API keys from frontends.

business_rules.name: service_owned_metrics
business_rules.requirement: Career market and customer workflow KPIs are service-owned read models, not app-side broad count queries.
business_rules.implementation_hint: Use GetCareerMarketMetrics and GetMyCareerMetrics; refresh market metrics after safe ATS import where practical.

business_rules.name: external_application_consent
business_rules.requirement: External ATS submissions require discovery, explicit customer confirmation, supported required fields, and manual fallback when unsafe.
business_rules.implementation_hint: Never let UI, crawlers, or AI submit directly to providers. Do not invent answers to required provider questions.

workflow_rules.name: customer_career_navigation
workflow_rules.requirement: Customer Career pages use separate overview, list/search, create, detail, and edit surfaces with consistent navigation and breadcrumbs.
workflow_rules.implementation_hint: Use /customer/career/{entity}, /new, /{id}, and /{id}/edit routes where practical. Detail pages should not render list/search below them.

workflow_rules.name: resume_export
workflow_rules.requirement: Resume view/download should include profile content, profile skills, and attached employment records in readable full-page output.
workflow_rules.implementation_hint: Avoid raw pipe separators and do not expose raw PDF bytes in chat or page text.

workflow_rules.name: ai_job_search_limits
workflow_rules.requirement: AI search_jobs returns compact capped summaries and uses get_job for full detail.
workflow_rules.implementation_hint: Default AI job search to 10 results, cap at 20, exclude full descriptions from search result payloads, show posting date and More info source_url links when available, do not display internal GUID/job_id values, and preserve number-to-job_id mappings in hidden ceerat_job_refs metadata so follow-up details call get_job with the stable Ceerat id.

must_have_fields.name: order_id
must_have_fields.requirement: Invoice must identify the order it bills.
must_have_fields.implementation_hint: Add invoices.order_id as a required foreign key to orders.id and expose order_id in create/get/list invoice contract messages.

must_have_relationships.name: order_to_invoices
must_have_relationships.requirement: One order can have many invoices; each invoice belongs to one order.
must_have_relationships.implementation_hint: Use invoices.order_id -> orders.id. Add an index on invoices.order_id. Do not add a unique constraint on order_id.
